title: calvelia pterantha
intro: Calvelia pterantha, also known as the "butterfly tree", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Bignoniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Calvelia pterantha has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Calvelia pterantha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote overall well-being.
